metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

text.title: NewCalculationGUID
text.description: The GUID of the Calculation that has been created

text_1.title: SourceCalculationGUID
text_1.description: The GUID of the source Calculation that has been copied

text_2.title: ProcessingLogGUID
text_2.description: The GUID of the Processing Log for the Parent Flow

text_3.title: ProcessOwnerGUID
text_3.description: The GUID of the User that initiated the process

text_4.title: NewCalculationName
text_4.description: The Name of the Calculation that has been created

number.description: The number of Project Products that have been created
number.title: NumberOfProjectProducts

text_5.description: An array with old and new Project Product GUIDs
text_5.title: ProjectProductGUIDMapping

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [SUC] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run was successful. All required Positions have been added to the Calculation.

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run has failed. Positions may have been partially added to the Calculation. Check Log for further details.

Apply_to_each_created_Project_Product.description: Project Products assigned to Calculation Positions are pre-processed by replacing the "old" Project Product GUID with the "new" GUID

Filter_Calculation_Positions_by_Project_.description: Get all Calculation Positions of Type 'Project Product' where no BOM is assigned. Project Product Positions with BOM are processed separately because both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

Filter_Calculation_Positions_by_BOM_Proj.description: Get all Calculation Positions where a BOM Project Product is assigned. Exclude Positions from Type 'Project Product' - these Positions are processed separately because both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

Filter_Calculation_Positions_by_Project_.description: Get all Calculation Positions of Type 'Project Product' where a BOM Project Product is assigned. Both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

Remove_Project_Products_from_Calculation.description: Calculation Positions of type "Project Product" already processed in previous step - thus they need to be removed from the list of positions

Remove_BOM_Project_Products_from_Calcula.description: Calculation Positions flagged as "BOM" and assigned to a BOM Project Product already processed in previous step - thus they need to be removed from the list of positions

Merge_remaining_Calculation_Positions_wi.description: Merge previously processed Calculation Positions assigned to Project Products with remaining Calculation Positions (e.g. Nodes, Products, Project Hours, Production Hours, External Services, Project Expenses)

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Process @{length(body('Filter_Payload_by_Level'))} Level-@{variables('varIterationLevel')} Items with @{outputs('Calculate_Parallelism')} Batch(es) (Batch Size: @{outputs('Calculate_Batch_Size')}). @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

parameters.fetchXml:
<fetch version="1.0" count="1000" page="@{variables('varPageNumber')}" @{variables('varPagingCookie')}output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" returntotalrecordcount="true">
  <entity name="hso_calculationdetail">
    <!-- Core attributes -->
    <attribute name="hso_calculationdetailid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_name"/>
    <attribute name="hso_linenumber"/>
    <attribute name="hso_sortinglinenumber"/>
    <attribute name="hso_level"/>
    <attribute name="hso_linenumber_level"/>
    <attribute name="hso_positionelementtype"/>
    <attribute name="hso_calculationtype"/>
    <attribute name="hso_positiondetails"/>
    <attribute name="hso_positionquantity"/>
    <attribute name="hso_quantity"/>
    <attribute name="hso_language"/>
    <attribute name="hso_measurementproduct"/>
    <attribute name="hso_subproject"/>
    <attribute name="hso_isbillofmaterial"/>
    <attribute name="hso_calculationdetail_parentid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_calculationdetail_parentid_linenumber"/>
    <attribute name="hso_calculationdetail_parentid_sortinglinenum"/>

    <!-- Costing and pricing -->
    <attribute name="hso_costprice"/>
    <attribute name="hso_costpriceperunit"/>
    <attribute name="hso_costofmaterials"/>
    <attribute name="hso_costofmaterialsperunit"/>
    <attribute name="hso_salesprice"/>
    <attribute name="hso_salespriceperunit"/>
    <attribute name="hso_quotedprice"/>
    <attribute name="hso_quotedpriceperunit"/>
    <attribute name="hso_quotedprice_foreigncurrency"/>
    <attribute name="hso_quotedprice_new"/>
    <attribute name="hso_discount"/>
    <attribute name="hso_discountpercentage"/>
    <attribute name="hso_overheadsurcharge"/>
    <attribute name="hso_overheadsurchargepercentage"/>
    <attribute name="hso_profitsurcharge"/>
    <attribute name="hso_profitsurchargepercentage"/>
    <attribute name="hso_profit"/>
    <attribute name="hso_margin"/>
    <attribute name="hso_marginpercentage"/>
    <attribute name="hso_negotiationsurchargepercentage"/>
    <attribute name="hso_contributionmargintargetsalesprice"/>
    <attribute name="hso_contributionmargintargetsalespricepercent"/>
    <attribute name="hso_product_basepricewithoutmetalsurcharge"/>

    <!-- Metal-related -->
    <attribute name="hso_product_metalbase"/>
    <attribute name="hso_product_metalnumber"/>
    <attribute name="hso_product_metalsurchargeperunit"/>
    <attribute name="hso_product_metalbase_2"/>
    <attribute name="hso_product_metalnumber_2"/>
    <attribute name="hso_product_metalsurchargeperunit_2"/>
    <attribute name="hso_product_metalbase_3"/>
    <attribute name="hso_product_metalnumber_3"/>
    <attribute name="hso_product_metalsurchargeperunit_3"/>

    <!-- GAEB and text -->
    <attribute name="hso_gaeb_guid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_gaeb_id"/>
    <attribute name="hso_gaeb_ordinalnumber"/>
    <attribute name="hso_gaeb_partialordinalnumber"/>
    <attribute name="hso_gaeb_unit"/>
    <attribute name="hso_textblock_name"/>
    <attribute name="hso_textblock_description_max"/>
    <attribute name="hso_textblock_description"/>

    <!-- Price components -->
    <attribute name="hso_pricecomponentbreakdown"/>
    <attribute name="hso_pricecomponent_salaries"/>
    <attribute name="hso_pricecomponent_devices"/>
    <attribute name="hso_pricecomponent_material"/>
    <attribute name="hso_pricecomponent_others"/>
    <attribute name="hso_pricecomponent_unknown"/>

    <!-- Timing / labor -->
    <attribute name="hso_durationinminutes"/>
    <attribute name="hso_durationinminutes_positionquantity"/>

    <!-- Manufacturer -->
    <attribute name="hso_manufacturer"/>
    <attribute name="hso_manufacturer_itemnumber"/>
    <attribute name="hso_manufacturer_typenumber"/>

    <!-- Miscellaneous -->
    <attribute name="hso_projecttype"/>
    <attribute name="hso_uomid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_surchargegroup_calculationid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_surchargegroup_baseid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_productid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_projectproductid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_projecthourid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_productionhourid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_projectexpenseid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_externalserviceid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_billofmaterial_projectproductid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_calculationdetail_alternativeid" />
    <attribute name="hso_topdown_executed" />

    <!-- Filter by calculation -->
    <filter>
      <condition attribute="hso_calculationid" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()?['text_1']}" />
    </filter>

    <!-- Related surcharge group -->
    <link-entity name="hso_surchargegroup_calculation" from="hso_surchargegroup_calculationid" to="hso_surchargegroup_calculationid" alias="sg" link-type="outer">
      <attribute name="hso_surchargegroupid"/>
    </link-entity>

    <!-- Related alternate position -->
    <link-entity name="hso_calculationdetail" from="hso_calculationdetailid" to="hso_calculationdetail_alternativeid" alias="alt" link-type="outer">
      <attribute name="hso_linenumber"/>
    </link-entity>

    <!-- Sort by linenumber ascending -->
    <order attribute="hso_sortinglinenumber" descending="false"/>
  </entity>
</fetch>

<fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" returntotalrecordcount="true" distinct="true">
  <entity name="hso_calculationdetail">
    <attribute name="hso_calculationdetailid" />
    <attribute name="hso_name" />
    <attribute name="hso_linenumber" />
    <attribute name="hso_sortinglinenumber" />
    <attribute name="hso_level" />
    <attribute name="hso_calculationid" />

    <filter>
      <condition attribute="hso_calculationid" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()?['text_1']}" />
    </filter>

    <!-- Only include records that have related Annotations (isdocument = true) -->
    <link-entity name="annotation" from="objectid" to="hso_calculationdetailid" link-type="inner" alias="a">
      <attribute name="annotationid" />
      <attribute name="filename" />
      <filter>
        <condition attribute="isdocument" operator="eq" value="1" />
      </filter>
    </link-entity>

    <!-- Optional sorting -->
    <order attribute="hso_sortinglinenumber" descending="false" />
  </entity>
</fetch>

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Create_GAEB_Text_Additions_for_Calculation_Positions')?['Ids'])} GAEB Text Additions added to Calculation Positions. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

parameters.fetchXml:
<fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" returntotalrecordcount="true" distinct="true">
  <entity name="hso_calculationdetail">
    <attribute name="hso_calculationdetailid" />
    <attribute name="hso_name" />
    <attribute name="hso_linenumber" />
    <attribute name="hso_sortinglinenumber" />
    <attribute name="hso_level" />
    <attribute name="hso_calculationid" />

    <filter>
      <condition attribute="hso_calculationid" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()?['text_1']}" />
    </filter>

    <!-- Only include records that have related GAEB Text Additions -->
    <link-entity name="hso_gaeb_textaddition" from="hso_calculationdetailid" to="hso_calculationdetailid" link-type="inner" alias="gt">
      <attribute name="hso_gaeb_textadditionid" />
      <attribute name="hso_name" />
      <attribute name="hso_description" />
      <attribute name="hso_kind" />
      <attribute name="hso_sortingorder" />
      <attribute name="hso_footer" />
      <attribute name="hso_textaddition_id" />
      <attribute name="hso_filled" />
      <attribute name="hso_empty" />
    </link-entity>

    <!-- Optional sorting -->
    <order attribute="hso_sortinglinenumber" descending="false" />
  </entity>
</fetch>

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error when adding Calculation Positions! @{length(outputs('Get_created_Calculation_Positions')?['body/value'])} of @{variables('varItemCount')} Positions added to Calculation. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Select_Alternate_Calculation_Positions'))} Calculation Positions updated with alternate position. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}
